full_text:
Dong Min (Shuying) 董旻 (叔穎)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Min (董旻), styledShuying (叔穎), was born in Longxi. Younger brother to Dong Zhuo. Helped eliminate He Miao but was purged when Dong Zhuo fell. Dong Min was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Dong Zhuo. Dong Min lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
